claims.subject: Unified Field Theory
claims.claim: The Unified Field Theory is the holy grail of science and nobody has found it yet.

claims.subject: Einstein
claims.claim: Einstein was originally looking for the Unified Field Theory.

claims.subject: Unified Field Theory
claims.claim: The Unified Field Theory needs to explain how gravity fits into quantum physics.

claims.subject: gravitons
claims.claim: Gravitons come out of quarks, electrons, protons, and neutrons.

claims.subject: gravitons
claims.claim: Gravitons may be repercussions, echoes, or explosions of higher-dimensional energies crashing into each other.

claims.subject: gravitons
claims.claim: The 'sound' of a graviton is sent out into space constantly.

claims.subject: gravitons
claims.claim: Gravitons suck two objects together by traveling along a path of a certain frequency, communicating back and forth between the objects.

claims.subject: gravitons
claims.claim: Gravitons work similarly to electrons in that they travel along an actual path determined by frequency.

claims.subject: scientists
claims.claim: Scientists are looking for a one-inch-long equation that explains everything together.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle created his own equation, L = MI², which he calls his new Unified Field Theory.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is not a mathematician, so his equation is 'hippie based' rather than mathematically derived.

claims.subject: Unified Field Theory
claims.claim: A true Unified Field Theory equation should explain matter, energy, and everything all at once.

claims.subject: human soul
claims.claim: The human soul represents the highest vibration and highest frequency energy in existence.

claims.subject: Unified Field Theory
claims.claim: The Unified Field Theory should revolve around the human soul as the highest-dimensional entity.

claims.subject: life
claims.claim: Life is what everything revolves around.

claims.subject: Christians
claims.claim: Christians believe everything revolves around humans — the sun around the earth, the earth around us.

claims.subject: human soul
claims.claim: Everything revolves around the human soul.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle acknowledges that animal souls exist, but centers his framework on the human soul.

claims.subject: human soul
claims.claim: The human soul is the highest-dimensional entity and therefore operates at the highest frequency.

claims.subject: L (in L = MI²)
claims.claim: In Kyle's equation, L stands for Life.

claims.subject: M (in L = MI²)
claims.claim: In Kyle's equation, M stands for the Matrix, which is the pathway along which everything moves in space.

claims.subject: Matrix
claims.claim: The Matrix is formed by all the gravitons that everything with mass shoots outward into space constantly.

claims.subject: string theory
claims.claim: According to string theory, there are gigantic bubbles and membranes in space created by masses emitting gravitons.

claims.subject: dimensions
claims.claim: There are different dimensions, each vibrating at different wavelengths, spread infinitely in all directions like a grid surrounding us.

claims.subject: dimensions
claims.claim: If two entities share the same wavelength they exist in the same world; if their wavelengths differ, their physical laws do not interact at all.

claims.subject: dimensions
claims.claim: There could be another complete three-dimensional solar system existing right where we are that does not react with us because it vibrates at a different wavelength.

claims.subject: dimensions
claims.claim: A parallel dimension that had the same beginning as ours could be almost identical to our world.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes he may exist in another dimension as another expression of his soul who made different life choices.

claims.subject: dimensions
claims.claim: There are an infinite number of different dimensions with different vibrations or wavelength shapes all occupying the same space we inhabit.

claims.subject: universe
claims.claim: The universe spreads out forever and contains an infinite number of stars with planets.

claims.subject: dimensions
claims.claim: There are an infinite number of dimensions right here where we are that we cannot see.

claims.subject: higher dimensions
claims.claim: Entities in higher dimensions may be able to watch us, did watch us, and came out of us before graduating to the next wavelength.

claims.subject: realms/wavelengths
claims.claim: There is a natural progression among realms and wavelengths in which frequencies get tighter and higher as you move up.

claims.subject: higher energy
claims.claim: As something becomes more energized it requires higher frequency.

claims.subject: I (in L = MI²)
claims.claim: In Kyle's equation, I stands for Intention — what we, as souls, want to do within the Matrix.

claims.subject: life
claims.claim: Life is the Matrix times Intention squared — it is us as souls doing whatever we want within the Matrix.

claims.subject: vibration
claims.claim: We adjust to the vibration of whatever we believe ourselves to be.

claims.subject: vibration
claims.claim: To change our vibration we simply have to change what we think we are, though it is very hard to conceptualize.

claims.subject: Unified Field Theory
claims.claim: A good Unified Field Theory should also explain the Heisenberg uncertainty principle.

claims.subject: Heisenberg uncertainty principle
claims.claim: The uncertainty principle concerns the fundamental question of the difference between a particle and a wave.

claims.subject: light
claims.claim: Light is both a particle and a wave — photons are the particles but light moves in a wave pattern.

claims.subject: photons
claims.claim: All photons traveling along a wave make the wave itself just as real as the particles.

claims.subject: light
claims.claim: Light works the same way as anything in the physical world — it is just units of protons (photons) shooting through the sky.

claims.subject: electrons and gravitons
claims.claim: Electrons and gravitons work differently from light — they operate within the Matrix itself rather than traveling through space as particles.

claims.subject: Matrix
claims.claim: Working within the Matrix would allow teleportation because you are not traversing physical space.

claims.subject: time
claims.claim: Time does not exist when operating in the higher-dimensional Matrix because of how the wavelength works there.

claims.subject: time
claims.claim: Time does exist for a particle of light that travels across physical space.

claims.subject: gravity
claims.claim: Kyle wonders whether gravity might be instantaneous because gravitons work within the Matrix rather than traveling through space.
